name: unifi-mcp
description: UniFi network management via MCP tools. Monitor devices, clients, network health, firewall rules, and perform management operations.

unifi_mcp_url.title: UniFi MCP Server URL
unifi_mcp_url.description: Full MCP endpoint URL including /mcp path. Default http://localhost:8001/mcp works if running via docker compose in this repo. Change if running on a different host or port.

unifi_mcp_token.title: MCP Server Bearer Token
unifi_mcp_token.description: Bearer token for authenticating with the MCP server. Must match UNIFI_MCP_TOKEN in .env. Generate with: openssl rand -hex 32

unifi_url.title: UniFi Controller URL
unifi_url.description: URL of your UniFi controller, e.g. https://192.168.1.1:443. No trailing slash.
